controls.title: Security Management Process
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to prevent, detect, contain, and correct security violations.

controls.title: Access Control
controls.description: Implement technical policies and procedures for electronic information systems that maintain electronic protected health information to allow access only to those persons or software programs that have been granted access rights.

controls.title: Transmission Security
controls.description: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to electronic protected health information that is being transmitted over an electronic communications network.
